overall.description: First-person gameplay footage moving along a rural asphalt road at night through an autumn forest. The player passes a lit wooden house and approaches an abandoned vehicle. The atmosphere is dark and moody with blue-toned moonlight illuminating the orange foliage.

low stone wall running alongside the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark rural road at night, surrounded by dense autumn forest. The camera moves forward along the asphalt, approaching a wooden house with illuminated windows that appears on the left side. A stone wall becomes visible running parallel to the road.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the wooden house on the left, with its warm lights creating a brief change in lighting. The house recedes behind as the road continues through the forest. A road sign appears on the left, and the stone wall runs closer to the road edge.

segments.scene_description: The road becomes more enclosed by dense forest. The stone wall runs alongside the left edge of the road. An abandoned bus comes into view ahead, stationary on the right side of the road, creating an obstacle in the path.

agents.ego_description: passing the abandoned bus on the right and continuing deeper into the dark forest

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the abandoned bus on the right side, revealing the open road ahead. The bus recedes behind as the journey continues through the dense autumn forest. The stone wall fades into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark rural road that transitions from the warm glow of a roadside home to the eerie sight of a derelict vehicle. It begins by advancing through a dense autumn forest, where the darkness is briefly broken by the illuminated windows of a wooden house and a stone wall appearing on the left. As the camera passes the house and its warm light recedes, the road becomes more enclosed by the forest and a road sign emerges beside the continuing stone wall. The scene then shifts as an abandoned bus comes into view, stationary on the right side of the road and creating a looming obstacle in the path. Finally, the camera glides past the bus to reveal the open road ahead, leaving the vehicle and the fading stone wall behind as the journey continues deeper into the woods.
